service_id.description: Plural service ID used to authorize log access and scope results to that service. Provide this or cluster_id.

cluster_id.description: Plural cluster ID used to authorize log access and scope results to that cluster. Provide this or service_id.

query.description: Query string to filter log lines (syntax depends on the configured log backend).

facets.description: Facet filters to narrow logs by structured fields (e.g. namespace, pod).

limit.description: The maximum number of logs to return

time_range.description: Optional time window; if omitted, defaults to roughly the last 30 minutes.

start.description: The start time to use to filter logs. Provide in ISO8601 format.

end.description: The end time to use to filter logs. Provide in ISO8601 format.
